summary: Comprehensive end-to-end testing of ORIONIS v3.0 system completed. Backend APIs (both legacy /api and new /api/v1) fully operational with 100% success rate. Frontend neural interface working perfectly with ORB animations, authentication flow, chat functionality, and responsive design. All core AI features tested and verified.
